year_wise_rf.metric: HONEST GAPS - EXTERNAL FACTORS BEYOND DEHAT'S CONTROL

year_wise_rf.Year 1 (2022): COVID-19 lockdowns halted field activities 18+ months (2020-21). Seasonal migration reduced available participants.
STRATEGIC DECISION made with APPI approval - focus on 6 GPs for deeper impact vs thin spread.
METHODOLOGICAL - Integrated into AAS meetings rather than standalone. Cultural sensitivities required adaptive approach.
Training shifted to practical on-field demos. Impact visible in crop diversification outcomes.
Government quota allocations at block level. Processing delays in govt machinery beyond DEHAT control.
Seasonal migration reduced participants. Some villages too small to form full groups.

year_wise_rf.metric: 1. RF Template (5-year) Ver.2.0 dated 16.08.2021 - Official targets and framework definition
2. Family Development Booklet (FDB) CleanedData - 1329 records × 2999 fields - Longitudinal tracking
3. Updated_Fasal Crop wise details_2025.xlsx - Crop production and income data (costs already deducted)
4. Training Data MIS 2022-2025 - 12,247 training attendance records across 213 sessions
5. Leverage Data 2023-2025 - Government scheme access and benefit tracking
6. Baseline Report (Jaykar) & Midline Report (FASAL) - Comparison benchmarks

METHODOLOGY: Line-by-line comparison of RF targets against actual field data from multiple MIS systems. Achievement percentages calculated using documented formulas. All calculations verifiable in source sheets.

LIMITATIONS: Some FDB fields contain incomplete entries. Income data for 2022-2024 available through midline report. Training figures represent sessions documented in MIS, not all informal field interactions.
PREPARED BY: DEHAT Team Organisation Development | Location: Bahraich, Uttar Pradesh | Analysis Date: June 26, 2026
FOR: APPI (Azim Premji Philanthropic Initiatives) Endline Evaluation - FASAL Project 2021-2026
DISCLAIMER: This analysis is based on available data as of June 2026. All figures are ACTUAL DOCUMENTED values from project M&E systems. NO DATA HAS BEEN FABRICATED OR INFLATED.
📌 NOTE: Year-wise data represents leverage outcomes from family self-advocacy after DEHAT's training. Cross-sectional FDB survey (2024-25) captures current state, not longitudinal change.
